title: Tasty Thick Chinese Rice Congee
description: A quick and easy Chinese dish made with rice, vegetable oil, and various seasonings, perfect for a comforting meal. This congee is shojin-friendly and can be prepared in no time.
instructions: Rinse the rice thoroughly and drain well.
In a large pot, combine the rice and water, and bring to a boil over high heat.
Reduce the heat to low, cover, and simmer for 1 hour, or until the rice has broken down and the mixture has thickened.
Heat the vegetable oil in a small pan over medium heat.
Add the sliced ginger and cook, stirring occasionally, until crispy and golden brown.
Add the chopped scallions to the pan and cook, stirring constantly, for 1 minute.
Stir the soy sauce, sesame oil, and salt into the congee.
Add the cooked ginger and scallions to the congee and stir to combine.
Serve the congee hot, garnished with additional scallions if desired.
